description: Synthetic leather sandals combining style and durability by catwalk. Fashioned in understated hues, this open-toed pair provides style and comfort coupled with durability. These go with ethnic and casual ensembles. UpperSynthetic leather upper cut out at the midfootContrast straps covering the toes with cut out patterningMildly padded footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heelBranding grooves on forefoot and floral grooves on heelSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
